Description.Name: What About Me?
Description.Details:
You sit in your command chair aboard the Argo when the hatch slides open and [[TGT_MW,{TGT_MW.Callsign}]] steps in, posture tight with frustration.



"Commander," {TGT_MW.Subj} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:begin|Default:begins}, "I've logged hundreds of hours in the simulators. Why am I not getting combat drops?"



You fold your hands, studying them for a moment before answering.

Description.Name: Placate {TGT_MW.Callsign} changes are coming.
Description.Details: Placation

Description.Name: Placate MW (malevolent)
Description.Details:
You soften your tone. "I hear you. You've put in the work, and it shows. The truth is, I've been holding you back because I'm waiting for the right mission for you. You're close. Stay sharp a little longer, and I'll make sure you're on the next op that suites your abilities."

{TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:raise|Default:raises} a questioning eyebrow, doubt on {TGT_MW.DET} face. "So... soon?"



You nod, smiling. "Soon."

Description.Name: I need you on the Argo
Description.Details: Lie to {TGT_MW.Callsign} [dishonest]

Description.Name: Lie to MW (malevolent)
Description.Details: You lean forward slightly, lowering your voice. "You think I haven't noticed your performance? I have—that's exactly why you're still aboard the Argo. I need someone with your skill set here, keeping the training rotations tight, running sim calibrations, and making sure the rest of the lance doesn't get sloppy between contracts." {TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:look|Default:looks} at you skeptically. "You're saying I'm… more valuable here?" "Right now?" you say with quiet certainty. "Absolutely. Out there, you're one pilot. In here, you keep all my pilots sharp."

Description.Name: Lie to MW (bitter)

Description.Name: [Compensate bonus up to ¢1,200,000 C-Bills]
Description.Details: Pay {TGT_MW.Callsign} owed backpay.

Description.Name: Compensate {TGT_MW.Callsign} (malevolent)
Description.Details:
You let out a measured breath and key a command into the console. "You're right—you signed on to fight. I haven't given you that. So I'm authorizing combat-equivalent pay for your last cycle, rounded up, which comes to a total of ¢600,000 C-Bills."

{TGT_MW.Subj_C} {TGT_MW.Gender?NonBinary:don't|Default:doesn't} react the way you expect. {TGT_MW.OBJ_C} eyes narrow. "Back Pay?"

"It's recognition," you reply. "You've been ready. That counts."

[[TGT_MW,{TGT_MW.Callsign}]] shakes {TGT_MW.OBJ} head slightly. "With all due respect, Commander... C-Bills don't build a combat record. No drops means no reputation. No reputation means no future contracts."

You hold their gaze. "You're still on this ship. That future hasn't changed."

"Or it's passing me by while I sit in a simulator," they counter quietly as they turn and walk away.

Description.Name: Fire {TGT_MW.Callsign}
Description.Details: [Terminate Contract]

Description.Name: Terminate {TGT_MW.Callsign}'s contract
Description.Details:
Your expression hardens. "If you can't accept how I run this command, then you don't belong in it."

Their frustration finally boils over. "Accept it? I've been sidelined while my career stalls out. Every day in that simulator is a day no one remembers. You've wasted my time."

You don't flinch. "I've invested in keeping you alive."

"I didn't sign on to wait," they snap. "I signed on to fight."

"And I decide who fights," you reply coldly. "Your contract is terminated. You'll disembark at the next star system."

They let out a bitter laugh. "Finally—somewhere I might actually see combat."

The hatch opens behind them, and this time, they don't wait for dismissal before walking out.
